title: lichen_l2.c lichen_l2_send does not check pkt for NULL before net_pkt_get_len
description: In lichen_l2.c:324, net_pkt_get_len(pkt) is called, but the NULL check for pkt happens at line 307, before the LoRa running check at line 318. If someone adds code between lines 307-324, they might inadvertently access pkt before the NULL check. The current code is safe, but consider moving net_pkt_get_len closer to its validation or adding an assertion.
